title: Racosperma excelsum

At the genus level, Racosperma excelsum belongs to the group Acacia, a large and diverse group of plants with similar characteristics. The exact classification of Racosperma excelsum may vary depending on the source and current taxonomy.

intro: Racosperma excelsum, also known as Acacia excelsa, is a native Australian tree species belonging to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its tall stature and distinctive yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
